title: goodenia gypsicola
intro: Goodenia gypsicola, also known as Gypsocolla Goodenia, is a flowering plant species native to Western Australia. It has been traditionally used by indigenous Australians for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing pain and inflammation, and may also have antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, Goodenia gypsicola is often made into a tea or infused oil, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human use.
